pages.text: 一家人来到露营地！Sam爸爸搭好帐篷，咘咘好开心！
pages.text_en: The family arrived at the campsite! Daddy Sam set up the tent, and Bubu was so happy!

pages.text: 咘咘看到草地上好多小花，红的黄的紫的，好漂亮呀！
pages.text_en: Bubu saw so many little flowers on the grass — red, yellow, and purple. So pretty!

pages.text: 咘咘伸手想摘花——NOMI轻轻拉住她：「眼睛看，不要摸。花花留在这里，明天还能看到哦」
pages.text_en: Bubu reached out to pick a flower — NOMI gently held her hand: "Look with your eyes, don't touch. If the flowers stay here, we can see them again tomorrow!"

pages.text: 咘咘发现了蒲公英！圆圆的白色绒球，好神奇呀！
pages.text_en: Bubu found a dandelion! A round white fluffy ball — how magical!

pages.text: 一家人一起吹蒲公英～呼～小伞兵飞起来了！咘咘开心地拍手！
pages.text_en: The whole family blew the dandelion together — whoosh! Little paratroopers flew into the air! Bubu clapped her hands with joy!

pages.text: 嗡嗡嗡——一只小蜜蜂在花上采蜜。咘咘好奇地凑近看。
pages.text_en: Buzz buzz buzz — a little bee was collecting nectar from a flower. Bubu leaned in curiously to watch.

pages.text: NOMI说：「小蜜蜂在工作呢，我们远远看就好。用手碰的话，会被蛰一个大包包哦！」
pages.text_en: NOMI said: "The little bee is working! Let's watch from far away. If you touch it, you might get a big sting bump!"

pages.text: 咘咘蹲下来，发现地上有一队小蚂蚁在搬东西，好厉害！
pages.text_en: Bubu looked down and found a line of little ants carrying things on the ground. So amazing!

pages.text: 咘咘记住了：小蚂蚁也不能碰，远远看就好。「眼睛看，不要摸！」咘咘大声说。
pages.text_en: Bubu remembered: don't touch the little ants either, just watch from far away. "Look with your eyes, don't touch!" Bubu said loudly.

pages.text: 太阳快下山了，天空变成橙红色。一家人坐在帐篷前，NOMI给咘咘倒了一杯热可可。
pages.text_en: The sun was setting, painting the sky orange-red. The family sat in front of the tent, and NOMI poured Bubu a cup of hot cocoa.

pages.text: 咘咘说：「今天好开心！下次还要来露营！」眼睛看，不要摸～🌸
pages.text_en: Bubu said: "Today was so much fun! I want to go camping again!" Look with your eyes, don't touch~ 🌸
